channel.title: SuperCow AI News Podcast
channel.description: Daily AI news generated by NotebookLM

item.title: The day AI found its body (2026-04-18)
item.description: Today's AI news: GPT-5.4/Gemini 3.1 Pro, SpaceX-xAI merger, AGIBOT, Quantum AI, and GPT-Rosalind.
item.itunes:summary: Today's AI news: GPT-5.4/Gemini 3.1 Pro, SpaceX-xAI merger, AGIBOT, Quantum AI, and GPT-Rosalind.
